Hero.description: Safe choices don't win markets. We engineer the tech that runs your business and the marketing that scales it to give your brand an unfair, undeniable advantage.

RealityCheck.text: You’ve hit a wall. The tactics that got you here are now breaking your infrastructure. Your code is crumbling under the traffic, or your marketing is failing to bring it in.

Auth.error_password_min: Password must be at least 10 characters long.

Contact.title: Let's cut the small talk.
Contact.subtext: Tell us what's broken or what you want to conquer. If it's ambitious, we're in. If it's boring, we'll pass.
Contact.holding_back: is holding us back. We need someone who can
Contact.error_text: A technical glitch almost let your project slip away. We shouldn't let that happen. Don't let a minor error be the end of this.

Arsenal.build_description: Custom Software, High-Performance Hosting, and SaaS infrastructures that don't crash when traffic spikes.
Arsenal.growth_description: A great product is useless if nobody uses it. We engineer the attention your brand deserves. From cut-throat performance marketing to seamless fulfillment—we make sure the market pays attention. And pays you.

EnterpriseBento.section_headline: Built for Europe's most valuable brand.<sup1>1</sup1>
EnterpriseBento.nda_hint: Further undisclosed market leaders under NDA
EnterpriseBento.card1_headline: Scaling sales operations for T-Mobile on a national level.<sup2>2</sup2>
EnterpriseBento.card2_text: Built for real-time customer interactions. This means zero tolerance for lag or errors. The tool never gets in the way. High-speed performance wasn't a feature—it was the core design principle.
EnterpriseBento.card3_text: Engineered for non-stop use across Germany. The frontend is effortlessly intuitive, while the backend is a digital fortress. Full access control, strict compliance, and maximum resilience.

Legal.privacy_content:
1. Data Protection at a Glance
We take the protection of your personal data very seriously. We treat your personal data confidentially and in accordance with the statutory data protection regulations and this privacy policy.

2. Data Collection on Our Website
We only store a strictly necessary cookie to save your language preference. No third-party trackers are running without your consent.

3. Your Rights
You have the right to receive information about the origin, recipient, and purpose of your stored personal data at any time free of charge.
Legal.terms_content:
1. Scope of Application
These Terms of Service apply to all interactions with Buff.

2. Services Provided
We provide technical backbone, creative punch, and strategic clarity.

3. Liability
We build high-performance products. If it breaks, we fix it.

4. Final Provisions
Stop accepting average stuff.

Footer.title: We are Buff.
Footer.description: We provide the technical backbone, the creative punch, and the strategic clarity your brand is currently missing.

Growth.hero_description: Your ad budget is currently going down the drain. We build funnels that turn every click into profit. No guessing, just math.

Footnotes.note1: Based on the 2026 'Brand Finance Global 500' report, which ranks Deutsche Telekom as the most valuable brand in Europe.
Footnotes.note2: Refers to the development and nationwide rollout of a multifunctional consulting tool for employees of Deutsche Telekom Service GmbH.

GrowthArsenal.title: The Arsenal
GrowthArsenal.card1_text: We tear down your current funnels, analyze your unit economics, and build a customized growth blueprint. No guessing. Just math and market psychology.
GrowthArsenal.card1_title_traffic: We don't buy clicks. We buy customers.
GrowthArsenal.card1_text_traffic: Cross-platform media buying engineered to dominate your niche. We turn ad platforms from a gamble into a predictable revenue engine.
GrowthArsenal.card1_text_creative: Ad copy that converts and funnels that don't leak. We handle the entire creative fulfillment. Perfectly aligned with the technical infrastructure.
